description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 5th; Weight â; Price +4,000 gp DESCRIPTION Three times per day as a swift action, the wearer of expeditious armor can summon a burst of speed and gain a +10-foot enhancement bonus on all modes of movement for 1 round. This ability can be applied to any kind of armor, but not shields. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells expeditious retreat; Cost 2,000 gp
